tasks.name: 签到盒 - 阿里云盘
tasks.command:
cd checkbox || exit 1
printf '%s\n' "$CHECKBOX_CONFIG_YML" > config.yml
node checkbox.js aliyun

var.CHECKBOX_CONFIG_YML:
needPush: false
cbList: aliyun

aliyun:
  refresh_token: "你的refresh_token"

Push:
  sckey: ""
  qmsgkey: ""
  pushplustoken: ""

tasks.name: 签到盒 - 夸克网盘
tasks.command:
cd checkbox || exit 1
printf '%s\n' "$CHECKBOX_CONFIG_YML" > config.yml
node checkbox.js quark

var.CHECKBOX_CONFIG_YML:
needPush: false
cbList: quark

quark:
  cookie:
    - "你的夸克cookie"

Push:
  sckey: ""
  qmsgkey: ""
  pushplustoken: ""
